name: MCP Integration (experimental_createMCPClient)

architecture.client_manager: lib/mcp/client.ts — MCPClient singleton with graceful degradation
architecture.api_endpoint: GET /api/mcp/tools — lists tools from connected MCP servers
architecture.chat_integration: MCP tools pre-fetched before streamText, merged into tools + activeTools

api_surface.getMCPTools: Returns AI SDK compatible tool objects (empty if no MCP_SERVER_URL)
api_surface.resetMCPClient: Clears cached client (for runtime env changes)

graceful_degradation: Returns empty tools when MCP_SERVER_URL not set or connection fails
chat_route_changes: Pre-fetch: await Promise.all([getMCPToolNames(), getMCPTools()]) before stream
Active tools: ...mcpToolNames spread into experimental_activeTools array
Tools object: ...mcpTools spread into tools alongside inline tools
lint_errors_fixed: noUnusedVariables: error → _error in getMCPServerInfo catch block
organizeImports: auto-fixed import ordering via pnpm fix
